summary: Iteration 11: Tested Weekly Goals feature (GET/PUT /api/goals/current, GET /api/goals/history, message_type field, WeeklyGoalsWidget UI). All 14 backend tests passed (1 skipped due to no tracked colleges). All UI flows verified via Playwright.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11: Weekly Goals feature fully working. Backend: GET /api/goals/current returns week_start, week_label, goals, progress. PUT /api/goals/current saves goals and returns updated. GET /api/goals/history returns up to 8 weeks with achievement_pct. message_type field stored in emails. Frontend: WeeklyGoalsWidget renders on Dashboard (data-testid='weekly-goals-widget'). Edit pencil opens modal (data-testid='weekly-goals-edit-btn'). Modal has 4 goal inputs. Save Goals closes modal and shows progress bars. Achievement History toggle (data-testid='goals-history-toggle') expands to show 7 past weeks. Auth: test_session_iter10 token still valid.
verified_features: GET /api/goals/current returns week_start, week_label, goals, progress - PASS
PUT /api/goals/current saves goals and returns updated - PASS
GET /api/goals/history returns 8 weeks with required fields - PASS
Goals endpoints require auth (401 without token) - PASS
Weekly Goals widget renders on Dashboard - PASS
Edit pencil button opens Set Goals modal - PASS
Modal has 4 goal inputs (emails_sent, follow_ups, new_tracks, calls) - PASS
Save Goals closes modal and shows progress bars - PASS
Achievement History toggle expands to show past weeks - PASS
message_type field stored/returned in emails - PASS
